Our services

Boiler installation

Worcester, Vaillant and Ideal systems with warranty registration.

Why Armstrong

  1. Gas Safe registered — every gas job completed by certified engineers, with paperwork for landlords.
  2. Fixed written quotes — no surprise extras on boiler installs once we have surveyed your home.
  3. Local Leeds team — based on Kirkstall Road, covering LS postcodes and wider West Yorkshire.

Areas we cover

Leeds Bradford Wakefield

Common questions

Do you charge a call-out fee?

We do not charge for quotes within LS postcodes. Emergency out-of-hours visits may include a call-out fee—we tell you before we dispatch.

Are you Gas Safe registered?

Yes. Our registration number is 612847 (demo). You can verify this on the Gas Safe Register website.

How quickly can you fit a new boiler?

Most replacements are completed in 1–2 days once parts are confirmed. We often have same-week survey slots.

Need a plumber or heating engineer this week?

Tell us what is wrong—we will call you back within one working hour.
